expectations.evidence: '## Shotgun Surgery — significant' is the first section heading.

expectations.text: Identifies 'Divergent Change' or 'Feature Envy' smell by name
expectations.evidence: '## Divergent Change — significant' — UserService has two different reasons to change: business logic and notification routing.

expectations.text: Recommends Observer pattern as the primary solution
expectations.evidence: '## Primary Recommendation: Observer Pattern' — full section dedicated to Observer.

expectations.text: Explains why Observer fits — publisher/subscriber model
expectations.evidence: 'UserService just announces that something happened; independent handlers react to that event.' Full typed event + publisher implementation provided.

expectations.text: Explains how new channels are added without modifying UserService
expectations.evidence: 'Adding a new notification channel becomes adding a new subscriber — zero changes to UserService or existing handlers.'

expectations.text: Suggests concrete steps or migration path
expectations.evidence: Lists Step 1–Step 3 migration: define event types, create publisher, rewrite UserService to publish. Also mentions Extract Method as a stepping stone.
